overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a vehicle driving along the Senora Freeway through the Grand Senora Desert during dawn. The camera travels along the right lane past moderate traffic including sedans, trucks, and motorcycles, with power transmission towers lining the roadside and mountains visible through the morning haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with power transmission infrastructure

events.description: dark sedan passes in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: driving steadily in the right lane of the desert highway, maintaining consistent speed

notable_agents.action: pickup truck traveling in opposite direction on the left

entered.detail: tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple cross-arms and power lines
hazy mountain silhouettes against the pink dawn sky
metal barrier separating the opposing traffic lanes
large rectangular billboard structure with blank white face

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert highway during dawn, with the vehicle traveling along the right lane. Power transmission towers line the right side of the road while mountains loom in the hazy distance. Moderate traffic passes in the opposite lane separated by a metal guardrail.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching overhead directional sign gantry

events.description: motorcycle speeds past in the opposite lane
vehicle approaches closer to the overhead highway sign structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway while approaching the large overhead sign gantry visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: motorcycle with rider passing quickly in opposite direction

entered.detail: large metal truss structure spanning across the highway with green directional signs
colorful advertisement billboard with 'Sandy Shores' text visible on the right roadside

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle continues down the highway, a large overhead sign gantry becomes visible in the distance marking the route to Sandy Shores. A colorful billboard appears on the right side while power transmission towers move closer to the roadside. Traffic continues to pass in the opposite lane including a speeding motorcycle.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing under highway overhead sign gantry

events.description: vehicle passes underneath the large overhead highway sign gantry
large red tanker truck passes in the opposite lane

agents.ego_description: driving under and past the overhead sign structure, continuing along the desert highway

notable_agents.action: large red tanker truck traveling in opposite direction

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches and passes underneath the massive overhead sign gantry displaying directions to Sandy Shores and Los Santos. After passing the structure, the highway continues through the desert landscape with the Sandy Shores billboard now prominent on the right and power towers lining the roadside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a desert highway at dawn, transitioning from an open stretch of road toward a series of roadside markers and overhead signage. It begins with the vehicle traveling in the right lane past power transmission towers and hazy distant mountains, while moderate traffic flows in the opposite direction behind a metal guardrail. As the vehicle advances, a large overhead sign gantry and a colorful billboard emerge in the distance, with a speeding motorcycle passing by in the oncoming lane. The scene then shifts as the camera moves directly underneath the massive gantry displaying directions to Sandy Shores and Los Santos. Finally, the highway opens back up into the desert landscape, leaving the structure behind while the Sandy Shores billboard and power towers remain prominent along the roadside.
